prompt: Design a dashboard for a Healthcare analytics platform, prioritizing accessibility and soft UI. Use Tailwind CSS.

assertions.name: design_system_present
assertions.text: Does the output include the 'TARGET: [Project Name] - RECOMMENDED DESIGN SYSTEM' block?

assertions.name: accessibility_focus
assertions.text: Does the implementation include accessibility features (e.g., focus states, aria labels)?

assertions.name: soft_ui_applied
assertions.text: Is the 'soft UI' style (calming colors, soft shadows) visible?

assertions.name: checklist_verified
assertions.text: Is there a mention or evidence of the Pre-delivery Checklist being run?
